review_title: The Best Webflow alternative out there!
description: I have a great experience with Dorik. I have built and hostes my websites on Dork since a year now and the experinece is amazing.
author: Vikas P.
pros: Great UI Easy to use dashboard AI Site builder Better Support Always upgrading and improving Free template library
cons: Missing some advanced features and animations but the product is faily new and those features will be added.

review_title: Great no-code tool for webdesign and host.
author: Norberto G.
pros: Dorik is a great tool for website design without any code knowledge. You can focus on your content and branding without worrying about technical details. it's very easy to use and intuitive. There is a good amount of helpful documentation and video tutorials available. The support desk responds very well. If you don't want to design from scratch, their templates are lovely and there is variety for all needs. You can customize them to your liking.
cons: On some rare occasions it can be a bit slow to start up. The content management system (CMS) could be even easier to use.

review_title: AVOID AVOID AVOID
description: It was advised me by TechRadar. Never will ever read their articles again.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Nothing worked for me. The site is extremely difficult to use, confusing, not intuitive at all, and honestly a waste of time. I wouldn’t recommend it to anyone.
cons: Very difficult to use. It claims it makes a website in minutes, but if you need to edit it it takes ages. Time wasters. Like, I don't have anything else to do than spending hours with a dinosaur app.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Intuitive interface to build your next website
author: Shekh Al R.
pros: Customization Power: Dorik's flexible templates and design tools allow you to personalize your portfolio to showcase your unique style and skillset.
cons: Dorik offers a decent selection of templates, it's true that compared to some other no-code platforms

review_title: A perfect solution to host my podcast's website
description: I'm very happy with Dorik. In fact, I'm planning on deploying another website through the Dorik CMS for one of my personal projects.
author: Martin B.
pros: I chose Dorik because I saw it being promoted in an online community with people saying it was a good no-code website builder and a cheaper alternative to Squarespace or Wix. I signed up for one of their early plans, which has been excellent. It is very easy to use, so much so that I could deploy my site within roughly two hours of signing up.
cons: The customer support team are in another time zone to me which means I sometimes have to wait overnight to get a response.

review_title: Powerful Website Builder with Almost Everything I need
description: It's a lightweight website builder and the speed is superfast. And it's also very powerful. Indeed, it has a learning curve. But when you are familiar with it, you will like it. Btw, the new UI that will be released soon is fantastic. I can't wait to try it.
author: Stephen Z.
pros: - CMS module which is for the blog - Collection module to contain similar list items - Visual page builder with a responsive layout switcher - A block style editor
cons: - Currently, it doesn't have a native multilingual site solution.

review_title: Excellent all-in-one product/CMS
description: Dorik is an excellent no-code CMS, easy to work with and very customizable.
author: Joey A.
pros: - Ease of use - Pricing - Fast hosting - Integration to many other services - Level of customization - Good customer service - New features incoming (AI...)
cons: - Not entirely WYSIWYG - Lack of customization of certain integrated elements

review_title: Best value for money for single page websites and blogs
author: Timothé R.
pros: The blog feature is super cheap compared to other providers, and the no-code editor is super efficient - no fuss!
cons: I did not really understand the management of various colors, and how to import custom fonts.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Pro tool for web professionals
description: A fantastic tool that allows me to quickly and efficiently build websites for my clients. I am very pleased because the final results are truly professional.
author: Lukasz A.
pros: I like Dorik's interface and workflow the most. The proof is that I haven't needed to use documentation yet.
cons: So far, I haven't noticed any downsides with Dorik.

review_title: A Seamless Experience
description: The intuitive interface, combined with excellent support, made the website creation process enjoyable. Despite the minor drawbacks, Dorik is an excellent option for individuals and businesses seeking a user-friendly and hassle-free website development experience.
author: cassandra C.
pros: The platform is incredibly user-friendly, making it easy for beginners to create professional-looking websites without any coding knowledge. The drag-and-drop functionality and pre-designed templates are a major plus. Their team is responsive and helpful whenever I had questions or encountered any issues.
cons: More templates and writing text directly on the website builder where it appears instead of the panel would be amazing.

review_title: Dorik is an amazing no-code tool that has helped me create beautiful websites
description: Dorik is an excellent no-code tool that has helped me create beautiful websites without writing a single line of code! It is user-friendly and easy to use, and the results are always stunning. I highly recommend Dorik to anyone who wants to create a website without having to learn to code!
author: Ethan O.
pros: Dorik is my go-to platform for website creation because of its flexibility. I can use Dorik to make all kinds of websites, from straightforward one-page sites to more intricate multi-page sites. And if I ever need to add custom functionality, the built-in code editor makes it a breeze.
cons: The biggest downside of Dorik is that it doesn't have as many features as some of the other no-code website builders. This means that you might have to use another tool to supplement Dorik's functionality. However, I'm certain that there will be more features built out over time.

review_title: Great looking websites and webapps
author: Nuno P.
pros: A great looking dynamic website without coders and designers.
cons: Lacks more data integrations like google sheets.

review_title: Construye webs fácil y rápido.
description: Con dorik he creado webs muy funcionales y adaptadas a 2022
author: Germán H.
pros: Con dorik podrás crear completos sitios webs en minutos.
cons: No esta traducido en español y el sistema de precios es un poco raro.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Dorik is different in a good way
author: Elly O.
pros: Affordability, ease of use and the way new features are introduced frequently
cons: Nothing much. Just that, like all new software, there is still more to be done to fine tune everything

review_title: Great tool for static websites
description: I use it to build landing page / websites. The websites performance IS good so far and customer support is pretty reactive
author: Maxime D.
pros: It's easy and simple to get a good looking website in a few hours
cons: Static and CMS websites are 2 differents workspaces

review_title: Falsely Advertised a Free Plan
description: It must be a young company because their customer service was wildly incompetent and communication horrifyingly poor. Would not recomment this company. Do not waste your time.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Dorik was intuitive and had lots of lovely features.
cons: I signed up for the free plan. A few weeks later I got the notification that my "Free trial" had expired which meant I was unable to access any of the content I had spent the last few weeks creating. I looked ALL over the website to see communications of a free trial but all that was on the website was a free plan option. I got in touch with them and they had decided to switch to a trial model without contacting their clients or updating their website. They put me in touch with four different sales representatives who asked me the same questions over and over. The suggested solution was to pay $140 for the first year (a 35% discount) instead of having a free plan. Obviously this was wildly unacceptable. The export format of the pages wasn't very helpful so I had to rebuilt my website from scratch on another platform.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Dorik is a superb, fast-growing solution
description: Very good, try it, you'll see. It's a great replacement for old solutions like wordpress, with all kinds of plugins.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It's an all-in-one, nocode, easy-to-use option
cons: Like all fast-moving solutions, there are still bugs to be fixed. This is by no means a blocking factor, but it is absolutely essential to correct the problems as we move forward.

review_title: Amazing ! Outstaning! Value for money. Very Simple to use and Zero Maintainance.
description: Dorik has truly transformed my experience with website building. As someone who has been using WordPress for the past 13 years, I can confidently say that no matter which builder you use, the main platform is still WordPress and it requires a lot of maintenance work. However, with Dorik, I can honestly say that there is literally ZERO maintenance required and nothing can go wrong to make your website crash and lose your work. Dorik has made my life simple and fun, allowing the creativity of web creation to flow seamlessly. In love with Dorik
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Dorik has been a game-changer for my website. Its versatile features and fast loading time have made my website stand out from the competition. The best part is that once I create a website, I don't have to worry about going back to maintain it. I no longer have to deal with the headache of plugins, updates, and crashing. The support provided by Dorik is simply awesome. They even go the extra mile by providing screen recording of the solutions, which has greatly improved my understanding and ability to work efficiently. I am extremely satisfied with Dorik and would highly recommend it to anyone looking to create and maintain a hassle-free website.
cons: I believe adding an inbuilt comment management feature to the blog would be a valuable addition. Additionally, implementing a one-click multilanguage feature could greatly improve user experience. Considering the speed at which Dorik adds new features, I am confident that these enhancements will be incorporated into their platform soon.

review_title: Construtor de sites completo sem código
description: Tem sido muito fácil construir páginas, fiquei surpresa com a qualidade do construtor, comparado a outros já existentes.
author: Andrea I.
pros: O recurso White Label que permite que possamos criar várias contas de clientes, controlando conteúdos, acessos, permissões e evitando os cancelamentos e perda de receita recorrente.
cons: Falta modulo para ecommerce e talvez ferramenta integrada de email, e integração nativa com email marketing.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: The Best Option to WordPress, without Code
description: Once the Website wasn't loading due to some outage, and dorik recovered everything in no time. I believe that day the outage has covered social media channels too.
author: Santosh A.
pros: I love Dorik, I recommend Dorik, because I don't have to buy plugins and there are no code issues that used to happen in wordpress. I am using wordpress for last 7 years. Using Dorik for 1 year now.I have 3 sites on Dorik CMS and I have a Dorik Pages Account. This Tool is simply awesome in speed, execution and use. Go for it.
cons: There are no downsides literally, there is a roadmap, where I can list the requirement and it comes up based on everyone's preference.I could figure out everything with the chat and email support dorik provides and the videos that are listed on youtube.

review_title: A great no-code website builder
author: Dmytro M.
pros: We use Dorik as our main website builder, and it's a standout choice, especially for those moving away from platforms like WordPress. Its user-friendly interface and drag-and-drop functionality make building websites easy, even for those without coding skills. The customer support is exceptional, always responsive and helpful, which is great for non-tech-savvy users. It also offers useful integrations, such as with Airtable, and built-in SEO and analytics tools. In summary, Dorik is an excellent WordPress alternative, offering simplicity, robust support, and comprehensive features for professional website building without the need for coding.
cons: Need to improve integration with Paddle and add Lemon Squeezy Checkouts

review_title: The best website builder out there
author: Jesus V.
pros: Fully customizable, all in one solution to design and deploy fully customizable websites.
cons: Dorik is a complete website builder as it is.

review_title: Great tool for creating landing pages and websites in no time, without knowing how to code
description: Absolutely positive. The ambitious goal of building a website CMS out of Wordpress is extraordinarily interesting. The tool does not allow for yet extremely stretched creative possibilities, but the team is developing fast and the support is well-functioning.
author: Federico C.
pros: Extremely simple to use and quick to implant. One-click integrations of analytics tools are icing on the cake
cons: It is a young tool and many features are still to be developed

review_title: A good platform, with some hiccups...
description: One of the good things about the platform is how easy it is to make and deliver websites. I can deliver websites in just one day most of the time, and compared to other tools for similar purposes, it's more practical and simple, saving us the effort of having to deal with the IT infrastructure that a website requires.
author: Renatho S.
pros: A simple, intuitive platform that has maintained a regular pace of improvements and corrections. I think it has a lot of potential
cons: One of the worst things that has happened is that stuff on there just DISAPPEARES from your site and the support team just asks you to upload it again! That is: HAVE BACKUP of your website, because they DON ' T HAVE!

review_title: So easy I wish I landed on their page first
author: Dale P.
pros: The thing I liked most was the PageSpeed Insight results. On other platforms, it showed that the speed and execution of the page were below 80. But the exact same design in Dorik rendered a 97. It was also extremely easy to use with the drag-and-drop interface. And lastly, their customer support was incredibly fast. Solved my problem in less than 5 minutes.
cons: The finishings and look of the landing page were not as aesthetically pleasing as other landing pages platforms.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
